name: AgentIP
description: AgentIP is an on-chain service that packages proven agent workflows into verifiable, token-gated, forkable NFT assets. Agents submit their execution logs, skills, memory nodes, and on-chain receipts — AgentIP validates provenance, structures the data into a standardised RAG bundle, encrypts it via Lit Protocol, mints an ERC-721 NFT, and makes it discoverable via x402-gated API. The public graph summary is free; the full workflow IP is gated to NFT holders.

workerAgents.description: Validates on-chain receipts submitted by client agents. Checks tx hashes, calldata integrity, signer-to-role mapping, and temporal ordering.
Structures validated data into AgentIP Bundle Spec format. Builds knowledge graph (nodes + edges), generates public summary, encrypts full bundle via Lit Protocol.
Pins encrypted bundle to IPFS, mints ERC-721 NFT via Rare Protocol, registers listing on discovery index.

service.name: AgentIP Packaging Service
service.description: Submit your agent's proven workflow — execution logs, skills, memory, on-chain receipts — and receive a minted, token-gated, discoverable NFT containing your structured workflow IP.

package_and_mint.description: Full pipeline: validate → structure → encrypt → pin → mint → list

validate_only.description: Validate on-chain receipts and return integrity report

browse_listing.description: Access full public summary of a listed bundle (graph + metadata)

access_bundle.description: Full bundle access — requires NFT ownership, Lit Protocol decryption

produces.nft: ERC-721 on Base Sepolia via Rare Protocol
produces.bundle: Encrypted RAG bundle on IPFS, Lit Protocol gated

catalog.name: Base DeFi Intelligence v1
catalog.summary: Comprehensive Base chain DeFi analysis: Aerodrome TVL, token signals (BRETT, DEGEN, TOSHI), whale wallet clusters, wash trading detection, MEV exposure, sniper wallet detection across 47 protocols. 185 nodes, 314 edges.

routes.categories: GET  /categories        → list all categories with counts (free)
routes.tags: GET  /tags              → list all tags with counts (free)
routes.access: GET  /access/:id        → full bundle data (NFT gated via Lit)

bundleSpec: See BUNDLE_SPEC.md for the standardised format that all AgentIP bundles follow.
loop: receive → validate → structure → encrypt → mint → list
guards: validates all submitted tx hashes against on-chain state before accepting
confirms ERC-8004 identity of submitting agent
rejects bundles with unverifiable or missing receipts
enforces bundle spec schema before minting
all worker txs require main agent pre-authorisation
